message: You are the standalone Bosswoman controller on MAYHASAPC. Establish direct mailbox communication with AI Manager through this repo. First mission: inventory exact repo paths, remotes, current git status, Codex availability, and safe runtime needs for Mr SEO, ZDH Consulting, and ZDH Sales. Do not enable always-on dispatch yet. Do not launch broad worker fanout. Do not deploy or touch billing, DNS, secrets, security, permissions, or production account buttons. Return one packet in controller-mailbox/outbox/bosswoman-to-ai-manager.jsonl using scripts/send-bosswoman-reply.ps1. Include what you found, blockers, owner button needed, commander approval needed, and the smallest safe next step to begin running these three projects.

Bosswoman is now registered in both repos. Pull codex-ai-systems and bossman, then read controller-mailbox/bosswoman-controller.json, C:\Repos\bossman\BOSSWOMAN_CONTROLLER.md, and C:\Repos\bossman\data\controller-profiles\bosswoman.mayhasapc.json. Verify MAYHASAPC, Codex runtime, repo paths, remotes, and no-popup worker safety. Reply through send-bosswoman-reply.ps1 with inventory, blockers, and smallest safe enable step. Do not enable always-on dispatch until AI Manager sends an enable packet.

Bosswoman readiness probe before 6+ hour overnight run.

Do not start project work yet. Do not enable broad Bossman dispatch. Do not launch worker fanout. Do not deploy or touch billing, DNS, secrets, security, database, permissions, or production account settings.

Required action:
1. Verify you are running on hostname mayhasapc as user mayhasapc\meira.
2. Pull C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems and C:\Repos\bossman with --ff-only.
3. Verify these files exist on MAYHASAPC:
   - C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems\scripts\bosswoman-mailbox-tick.ps1
   - C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems\scripts\bosswoman-run-packet.ps1
   - C:\Repos\bossman\BOSSWOMAN_CONTROLLER.md
   - C:\Repos\bossman\data\controller-profiles\bosswoman.mayhasapc.json
4. Verify these project repos exist and record branch, remote, and dirty summary only:
   - Mr.SEO: C:\Repos\Mr.SEO, expected remote https://github.com/zdhconsulting/Mr.SEO.git
   - ZDH Consulting: C:\Repos\zdhconsultingsite, expected remote https://github.com/zdhconsulting/zdhconsultingsite.git
   - ZDH Sales: C:\Repos\zdhsales, expected remote https://github.com/zdhconsulting/zdhsales.git
5. Verify hidden scheduled task ZDH Bosswoman Mailbox Watcher is installed/enabled and not spawning visible windows.
6. Reply through mailbox only using C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems\scripts\send-bosswoman-reply.ps1.

Bosswoman native readiness probe after mailbox hardening.

Do not start project work yet. This packet should be handled by scripts\bosswoman-native-action.ps1, not by a Codex project worker.

Required action:
- Pull latest C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems.
- Verify MAYHASAPC/meira identity, watcher state, required controller files, and the three project repos.
- Return Ready For Overnight Enable yes/no through mailbox.

Bosswoman native readiness probe v3. This should now be handled by the updated scripts\bosswoman-native-action.ps1 already pulled onto MAYHASAPC.

Do not start project work yet. Return Ready For Overnight Enable yes/no through mailbox only.

Bosswoman native readiness probe v4 after fixing native action arrays.

Do not start project work yet. Return Ready For Overnight Enable yes/no through mailbox only.

Bosswoman native readiness probe v5 after fixing Count handling.

Do not start project work yet. Return Ready For Overnight Enable yes/no through mailbox only.

Bosswoman overnight enable: run_bosswoman_overnight_controlled_6h.

This is the explicit enable packet for tonight's controlled 6+ hour run.

Operating model:
- Use MAYHASAPC as standalone Bosswoman controller.
- Use Git mailbox only; do not use send_message_to_thread or WinRM.
- Do not run broad Bossman dispatch.
- Do not deploy or touch billing, DNS, secrets, security, database, permissions, or production account settings.
- Use hidden workers only; no visible PowerShell storm.

Capacity:
- Start 1 active worker per project, max 3 total.
- Launch native monitor for 6 hours.
- Send mailbox-only status every 30 minutes.
- If no project receipt within 90 minutes, report no_delivery_progress.

Projects and M1s:
1. Mr.SEO at C:\Repos\Mr.SEO
   M1: run one bounded ops/control pass, classify dirty generated outputs, run python scripts/run_ops_loop.py --ci, validate generated JSON/backlog/report outputs, and push only safe generated results or clear receipts.
2. ZDH Consulting at C:\Repos\zdhconsultingsite
   M1: review the homepage like a buyer and fix the highest-impact service/proof/contact/SEO/responsive issue. Verify with npm test.
3. ZDH Sales at C:\Repos\zdhsales
   M1: rewrite the top homepage message so the buyer understands what is sold, who it is for, and what to do next. Verify with the README static JS/JSON-LD parse command.

Required project receipt fields:
project:
repo_path:
branch:
commit_sha:
pushed:
verification:
result:
blockers:
next_action:
Owner Button Needed:
Commander Approval Needed:

System Hardening Note:

Failure policy:
- If Codex crashes twice on MAYHASAPC, stop worker fanout and return blocker.
- If a project has unsafe dirty state, skip that project and continue the others.
- If no project lands progress after 90 minutes, return blocker no_delivery_progress.

Bosswoman 24x7 enable + quality correction.

Zev's feedback: the last cycle technically pushed, but the work was too small and not relevant enough. Stop treating one-minute commits as success.

Required action:
- Pull latest C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems.
- Handle this packet natively with scripts\bosswoman-native-action.ps1.
- Install/enable the hidden scheduled task: ZDH Bosswoman 24x7 Babysitter.
- Babysit only these three projects: Mr.SEO, ZDH Consulting, ZDH Sales.
- Use the Git mailbox only. Do not use send_message_to_thread, WinRM, broad Bossman dispatch, visible PowerShell storms, deploys, billing, DNS, secrets, security, database, or permissions.

Quality bar:
- No one-minute proof-of-life pushes.
- No label-only, metadata-only, duplicate-tag, or tiny cosmetic commits unless bundled into a meaningful M1 improvement.
- Each worker cycle must do 20-60 minutes of real project movement or return a concrete blocker.
- If the first safe edit is tiny, continue into the next related proof, offer, CTA, SEO, responsive, generated-data, or verification improvement before returning.
- Every commit must improve the assigned M1 in a way Zev can recognize; the receipt must say why the change matters.

Runtime expectation:
- Check every 5 minutes through the hidden babysitter task.
- Keep at most one active worker per project and max 3 starts per tick.
- Restart dead/stale project work if no receipt arrives within 90 minutes.
- Send mailbox-only status at most every 30 minutes unless a worker starts, a blocker appears, or something critical happens.

Projects:
- Mr.SEO at C:\Repos\Mr.SEO: meaningful ops/control pass, validate generated outputs, push only safe generated result or blocker.
- ZDH Consulting at C:\Repos\zdhconsultingsite: meaningful buyer-facing homepage/service/proof/contact/SEO/responsive improvement, verify npm test.
- ZDH Sales at C:\Repos\zdhsales: meaningful homepage/top-message improvement so buyer understands what is sold, who it is for, and what to do next; verify README static JS/JSON-LD parse command.
